results.name: Afghanistan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. METHODOLOGY RULING: GENDER-APARTHEID-FORMAL-RECOGNITION formalized as independent 0.0-floor-qualifying category (Decree No. 18 May 14 removing minimum marriage age; People's Tribunal Dec 2025 crimes-against-humanity finding).

results.name: Haiti
results.key_finding: Near-floor confirm at 4.7. Mixed signal nets neutral: 1,243 killed in 141 drone ops (60%+ during anti-gang ops, 17 children) vs arriving UN-backed Gang Suppression Force (May 14) — incoming capacity not yet creditable.

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Downgrade 11.4 -> 10.2. CEO Witty departed abruptly mid-May amid expanding DOJ criminal probe (now incl. Optum Rx physician comp); AI-claim-denial suit survived MTD. ACC 1.25->1.125, INT 1.625->1.375. Remains Critical.

results.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
results.key_finding: Near-floor confirm at 2.3. DATA-HYGIENE FLAG: scanner slug must map to 'Democratic Republic of C' (2.3, rank 181), NOT 'Republic of Congo' (20.3, rank 149). New Ebola outbreak (Bundibugyo) in Ituri; 26.5M acute hunger; 23% reach rate.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. 33.7M in humanitarian need (largest globally); IPC Phase 5 famine in El Fasher and Kadugli since Sept 2025; 9M displaced. Pattern-continuation.

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. Airstrikes killed 982 civilians in 2025 (+53% YoY, 287 children); 3.6M displaced (record); response target cut 27%. Deepening of an already-floor pattern.

results.name: Johnson & Johnson
results.key_finding: FRAMING CORRECTION: prior 'bankruptcy escape denied' was WRONG — $10.5B talc settlement APPROVED Feb 14, 2026 (no admission of liability). Partial reparative credit: ACC 1.4->1.6, EQU 2.0->2.1. ENTITY-MAPPING: baseline is 'Johnson & Johnson' (27.5), not 'Johnson Controls' (50).

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: Modest upgrade 58.1 -> 59.1 (cost of conscience). Pentagon declared Anthropic a supply-chain risk over its guardrail insistence and is testing 4 replacements (I1/I2). INT 3.0->3.2, SYS 3.1->3.2. BOUNDARY WATCH: 0.9pt below Functional/Established (60.0); no crossing.

results.name: Turkey
results.key_finding: Downgrade to 10.3. Riot police stormed CHP HQ (tear gas, rubber bullets) May 24; appeals court nullified opposition leader Ozel's election. ACC/BND/EQU/INT docked. MATH-HYGIENE FLAG: stored 15.1 vs formula 13.4 (diff 1.7); used 13.4 baseline per Hungary precedent. Remains Critical.

results.name: Bolivia
results.key_finding: Carry-forward at 28.4. May 27 military-deployment law and 4 confirmed deaths were ALREADY scored in the 2026-05-28 downgrade (30.9->28.4). Same event window; no double-counting. Reassess-on-resolution trigger not fired.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. NEW conduct sub-category AUTHORIZED-RESUMPTION-WITH-SYSTEMATIC-DENIAL (59% of authorized aid movements denied in execution, OCHA). Post-ceasefire civilian-targeting confirmed (As Saftawi family of 9; 23 killed Al Bureij).

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: SCALE-FLOOR RULING re-affirmed at 2.5. Internet restored May 25 after 88-day blackout (partial/reactive, NOT improvement signal). 39 political executions + 6,000+ arrests since Feb 28; 2,159 executions in 2025 (80% global).

results.name: Amazon
results.key_finding: Confirm at 12.8. Mixed signal nets neutral: first-ever NLRB bargaining order + UPT-strike-docking ban (compelled, AB2 anchor 2; Amazon challenging certification) offset by 30,000 layoffs + $725B AI capex + union-busting.

results.name: Microsoft
results.key_finding: Confirm at 65.3. Mixed signal nets neutral: EFF credits Microsoft as comparative Big Tech leader on Gaza HR accountability vs Google/Amazon, but investigation scope undisclosed + UNHRC profiteering listing + Israel-chief departure. Step already reflected in ACC 3.8.

results.name: Oracle
results.key_finding: Carry-forward at 20.6 (boundary: 0.6pt above Critical). WARN Act last-working-day window opens May 30 — anticipated, not yet materialized. ALGORITHM-BASED-WORKER-CLASSIFICATION-TO-AVOID-LABOR-PROTECTIONS candidate noted but not yet scorable.

results.name: Apple
results.key_finding: Rotation carry-forward at 59.4 (0.6pt below Functional/Established). No entity-specific scanner news; no dated institutional event.

math_hygiene_flags.note: Pre-existing drift flagged by validate-indexes (below 2.0 error gate). Used formula-correct 13.4 baseline per Hungary-2026-05-18 precedent. Reconcile on apply.

data_hygiene_flags.recommendation: Add explicit slug field to truncated entry.

methodology_rulings.ruling: Formalized as independent 0.0-floor-qualifying conduct category. State policy that systematically and by law extinguishes the civic/economic/bodily-autonomy capacity of half its population (incl. removal of any minimum marriage age) is the definitional 0.0 harm-flag case.

New conduct sub-category: aid nominally authorized but majority denied in execution (59% per OCHA). Distinct from outright blockade; produces obstruction effect while preserving access claim. Strengthens but does not change existing 0.0 floor.

Held at floor-adjacent 2.5 (not absolute 0.0): single dominant extremity (execution rate) plus blackout-during-mass-arrests does not meet multi-category extremity threshold for absolute floor. Partial/reactive internet restoration is not an improvement signal.

Two-sided for compassion scoring: court-approved $10.5B compensation fund = partial reparative credit (AB5/EQU5), capped by no-admission structure and Texas-two-step accountability-avoidance critique (AB1/AB3). Net small positive. Corrects prior-scan factual error.

Noted as scanner candidate but NOT yet scorable — depends on litigation findings (WARN window opens May 30) that have not landed. Future ACC/BND/INT scoring event if a court finds the 'remote' reclassification was a WARN-avoidance device.

baseline_corrections.reason: correct DRC entry 'Democratic Republic of C' (not Republic of Congo 20.3)

top_3_most_consequential_findings.finding: METHODOLOGY RULING: GENDER-APARTHEID-FORMAL-RECOGNITION formalized as an independent 0.0-floor-qualifying conduct category (Decree No. 18 removing minimum marriage age; People's Tribunal crimes-against-humanity finding). Floor confirmed at 0.0.

FRAMING CORRECTION of prior-scan factual error: $10.5B talc settlement was APPROVED Feb 14 2026 (no admission of liability), not denied. Partial reparative credit (ACC 1.4->1.6, EQU 2.0->2.1); modest upgrade 27.5->28.4. Entity-mapping flag (not Johnson Controls).

Downgrade to 10.3 for opposition suppression (CHP HQ raid May 24 + judicial nullification of opposition leadership). Pre-existing math-hygiene drift (stored 15.1 vs formula 13.4) flagged for reconciliation. Remains Critical.

methodology_version_signal: v1.2 sustained. New/affirmed categories this cycle: GENDER-APARTHEID-FORMAL-RECOGNITION (Tier-1 floor), AUTHORIZED-RESUMPTION-WITH-SYSTEMATIC-DENIAL (conduct sub-anchor), SETTLEMENT-WITHOUT-ADMISSION (Tier-3), SCALE-FLOOR-RULING (re-affirmed), ALGORITHM-BASED-WORKER-CLASSIFICATION-TO-AVOID-LABOR-PROTECTIONS (candidate-pending). Candidates for v1.3 formalization.
